User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user subscription and usage data

uid.description: The unique ID of the user

email.description: The email address of the user

displayName.description: The display name of the user

isPremium.description: Whether the user has a premium subscription

trendsClickCount.description: Number of times market trends were viewed

Feedback.title: User Feedback
Feedback.description: Stores user suggestions and issue reports

uid.description: The unique ID of the user who submitted the feedback

email.description: The email address of the user
